word: G4033 - περικυκλόω - perikyklóō - per-ee-koo-klo'-o - Compass round

sections.paragraph:
- Original: περικυκλόω

- Transliteration: Perikukloo

- Phonetic: per-ee-koo-klo'-o

- Definition:

1. to encircle, compass about

a. of a city (besieged)

- Origin: from G4012 and G2944

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4012 and G2944; to encircle all around that is blockade completely: - compass round.
